desc: Web-scale and security-hardened API key server for users, services, machine to machine, and AI agents. Token derivation brings fine-grained capability tokens t…
descFull: Web-scale and security-hardened API key server for users, services, machine to machine, and AI agents. Token derivation brings fine-grained capability tokens to avoid common API key pitfalls. Apache2 open source for indie deployments, commercial for scalable and HA.

hnPosts.title: Show HN: Open-source API Key server written in Go by Ory
